channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18328] sanity-sec test_51: FAIL: chown f51.sanity-sec
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4fbc325a-07c9-4348-b25e-b74eb3f8fd39

test_51 failed with the following error:

== sanity-sec test 51: FS capabilities =================== 06:10:00 (1728022200)
old_cap: 0x0 new_cap: +cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search
CMD: trevis-103vm19,trevis-103vm20 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.enable_cap_mask=+cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search
trevis-103vm19: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdt/lustre-MDT0000/enable_cap_mask=+cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search: Invalid argument
trevis-103vm19: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdt/lustre-MDT0002/enable_cap_mask=+cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search: Invalid argument
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm19: ssh exited with exit code 22
trevis-103vm20: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdt/lustre-MDT0001/enable_cap_mask=+cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search: Invalid argument
trevis-103vm20: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdt/lustre-MDT0003/enable_cap_mask=+cap_chown+cap_fowner+cap_dac_override+cap_dac_read_search: Invalid argument
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm20: ssh exited with exit code 22
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
 [/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/chown] [500] [/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/f51.sanity-sec]
/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/chown: changing ownership of '/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/f51.sanity-sec': Operation not permitted
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
 [/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/chown] [500] [/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/f51.sanity-sec]
/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/chown: changing ownership of '/mnt/lustre/d51.sanity-sec/f51.sanity-sec': Operation not permitted
 sanity-sec test_51: @@@@@@ FAIL: chown f51.sanity-sec

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-sec test_51 - chown f51.sanity-sec

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56624/
Subject: LU-18328 tests: fix old MDS version for sanity-sec/51
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: e1ff0ab51d10f37dc68c91d653c4a19bd947364c

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56624
Subject: LU-18328 tests: fix old MDS version for sanity-sec/51
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7e2d06d3c6732fde680277d6a6c2e2a65a3af247
